title: Task 51
prompt:
```bash
pixverse create image \
  --prompt "premium luminous 3D animated feature-film, true 3D depth, cinematic camera angles, volumetric light, little tiny dust motes, soft depth of field, expressive animated 3D eyes of all characters, realistic textures, true depth of field, focus on the foreground characters and objects with shallow cinematic 3d depth of field, detailed clear emotional staging, high-quality 4K animated movie look.

CHARACTER LOCKS:
@image1 = Merchants in a line before the gate: the exact background, city gate, wall, and merchant crowd for 100% unchanged architecture, lighting, and scale. This image also sets the visual style for the general merchant population.
@image2 = Beduin merchant full size: informs the style, attire, and details for the other merchants, specifically including an indigo-robed Beduin merchant.
@image3 = Guards: stern, grumpy, comically alert guards, exact as reference.
@image4 = Altair Royal Hawk open wings: the hawk in hilarious comical distress, exact as reference, with open wings, frantically flapping.
@image5 = Character sheet: general character style guide, ensuring all characters (merchants, guards) have a consistent premium animated look.

PROPS REFERENCE:
@image6 = Funny camel: a large, comically surprised camel, exact as reference.

SET GEOMETRY LAW: The city gate, ancient wall, and the general layout of the merchant line exact as @image1 are paramount. All structures, textures, and scale must be 100% unchanged. No deviations in architecture or background environment.
CAMERA LOCK: For the overall scene, the general perspective and camera height of the establishing shot in @image1 should be maintained as a reference point for continuity, adjusting for panel-specific angles.

SCENE: Morning scene.
A hilarious comical distress dynamic action scene unfolds as an Altair Royal Hawk in comical distress, clumsily carrying a rolled ancient scroll, approaches a bustling desert city gate. Merchants below react with a mix of comical awe, distress, and mild boredom, while stern guards look up, comically alert to the chaos above. Bright desert morning light, strong directional key light from above-left, soft fill light, subtle rim lighting on characters, 35mm lens for wide shots, 85mm for close-ups, shallow depth of field.

Create 2x2 grid with 4 panels with 3D animated scenes in each one:
Panel 1: Wide Master Shot, low angle POV towards the sky. The majestic city gate and ancient wall from @image1 dominate the mid-ground. Above, the Altair Royal Hawk exact as @image4 is in full, hilarious distress, wings flailing, head comically twisted, barely clutching a rolled, parchment scroll with a royal seal. Below, the initial crowd of merchants (styled on @image2) and several stern guards (exact as @image3) are visible near the gate, their gazes beginning to turn upwards. A large, surprised camel exact as @image6 stands near a merchant.
Panel 2: Medium Shot, low angle. Focus tight on the Altair Royal Hawk exact as @image4, mid-air, a bead of sweat comically dripping from its brow. Its talons are barely holding onto the rolled ancient scroll, which threatens to unspool. Its eyes are wide with exaggerated panic. The top of the city gate from @image1 is blurred in the background, implying its proximity.
Panel 3: Medium Shot, eye-level. A small group of merchants (styled on @image2, including an indigo-robed Beduin merchant in the foreground) are clustered, looking up. One merchant has dropped a basket of dates, another points with wide eyes, a third yawns with comical indifference. The camel exact as @image6 has its head comically tilted upwards, one ear twitching. The lower part of the city wall from @image1 is visible behind them.
Panel 4: Tight Two-Shot, low angle. Two stern guards exact as @image3 stand at the gate entrance, looking up with comically exaggerated vigilance. One guard has his hand on his scimitar, eyes squinted in confused alertness. The other has his mouth slightly agape, pointing skyward with a mix of duty and bewilderment. Their faces are lit by the morning sun, revealing every detailed wrinkle and furrow. The arch of the gate from @image1 frames them in the background.

Environment: Bustling desert city gate and ancient wall, exact as @image1. All architecture, background objects, lighting, and scale, as well as character designs for merchants and guards, remain consistent and unchanged from references.

All panels must be consistent between each other as to the backgrounds, positioning and characters as one beat-to-beat story. Style: premium luminous 3D animated feature-film, true 3D depth, cinematic camera angles, volumetric light, little tiny dust motes, soft depth of field, expressive animated 3D eyes of all characters, realistic textures, true depth of field, focus on the foreground characters and objects with shallow cinematic 3d depth of field, detailed clear emotional staging, high-quality 4K animated movie look." \
  --model "Nano Banana 2" \
  --quality "2160p" \
  --grid "2x2" \
  --json \
  --image "locations/merchants in a line before the gate.jpg" \
  --image "characters/beduin merchant full size.png" \
  --image "characters/guards.jpeg" \
  --image "characters/altair-royal-hawk open wings.png" \
  --image "characters/freepik__a-3d-digital-art-character-sheet-on-a-pure-white-b__22405.png" \
  --image "props/funny camel.png"
```
